_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Onboarding Stages
_meta.description: This is a dynamic, themed onboarding checklist component that visually breaks down setup stages with animated progress indicators, completion badges, and a customizable action button. It supports detailed theming, staged animations via framer-motion, and responsive layout variants for compact or expanded views. Perfect for onboarding flows, setup wizards, user education dashboards, or milestone-driven tasks where visual clarity and motivation matter.
